name: Andalusian Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic cloves.
2. Remove the crust from the bread and cut into cubes.
3. Chop one green pepper and peel the tomatoes. Cut 2 slices from one of the tomatoes and reserve them.
4. Process the garlic, bread, chopped pepper, tomatoes (minus the reserved slices), vinegar, oil, salt, pepper to taste, and sugar in a blender or food processor until smooth. If the mixture seems thick, add a little cold water to achieve a soupy consistency.
5. Chill the gazpacho.
6. Finely dice the cucumber, onion, red bell pepper, remaining green pepper, chervil, and 2 reserved tomato slices.
7. Divide the diced vegetables among separate serving bowls.
8. Add a couple of ice cubes to chilled soup cups and pour the gazpacho over. Garnish with the diced vegetables.
